reviews.comment:
Bien la comida y el lugar, la atencion de los playeros excelente. En el Bar clientes y empleados politizando y quemando la cabeza con canal de television politico

(Translated by Google)
The food and location were good, and the service from the beach staff was excellent. At the bar, customers and employees were politicizing and burning their brains with a political television channel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOFlfRVJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de Servicio YPF (ACA), Exelente atención, brinda todos los servicios acorde a su actividad, abierta las 24 hs., sanitarios limpios, espacios verdes disponibles.

(Translated by Google)
YPF Service Station (ACA), Excellent service, provides all services according to its activity, open 24 hours, clean restrooms, green spaces available.

reviews.comment:
Compre 2 alfajores etiquetados a $200 c/u y me cobraron $500, recomiendo solo usar los baños y no consumir nada ya que roban con sus precios y cobran lo que quiere

(Translated by Google)
I bought two alfajores labeled at $200 each and they charged me $500. I recommend only using the restrooms and not buying anything, as they rip you off with their prices and charge whatever they want.
